unit: D-08 / PL-11D native approach (client Approach / Keep-at-Range)
command: FollowBall(1, 3, 500.0) issued tick-aligned at t=3s (frame 180 of a 3780-frame, 60fps fixture)

clientContract.note: Both client verbs are the same destiny command; the corpus range 500m is a fixture selection like PL-11B's 2500m orbit.

equations.evolveFollow: goto point = targetPos + (pos - targetPos) * r/dist with r = range + shipRadius + targetRadius, recomputed every tick (Ballpark::EvolveFollow)
equations.gotoThrust: maxThrust = friction*speedFraction*maxVel/(mass*agility); inside homing distance d = speedFraction*maxVel*dt, thrust scales by (|delta|^2/d^2)^2 (Ballpark::GotoThrust, missile=false)
equations.integrator: PL-11A friction closed form: friction=1e6, effectiveMass=mass*agility, timeFactor=exp(-friction/effectiveMass); terminal velocity = speedFraction*maxVel

phases.fullThrust: ticks 1-9 (accelerating toward the setpoint at terminal velocity)
phases.rangeCrossing: the center distance crosses the 570 m setpoint near tick 10
phases.deepestOvershoot: minimum center distance 37.360883 m (the fixed target is non-massive; no collision)
phases.settle: damped return; speed < 1 m/s by ~tick 34, < 0.01 m/s by ~tick 47
phases.stationKeeping: mode remains DSTBALL_FOLLOW indefinitely; final center distance 568.299963 m (just inside the setpoint), final speed 9.838e-4 m/s at evolve 62

gates.corpusReplay: per-axis Near 1e-5 on position/velocity/acceleration for all 60 samples
gates.closedForm: every sample re-derived from its predecessor via the recovered equations at mixed (1e-8 abs, 1e-10 rel) — PL-11A-class gates; magnitudes stay at the 2.5e3 m fixture scale, no warp ULP waiver
gates.aggregate: min center in [30,50], final center in [560,580], final speed < 0.01, mode FOLLOW / followBallId 3 / followRange 500 at evolve 62
gates.determinism: bit-exact equality across two ego runs, a fixed-observer run, and a run with the PL-12 celestial set present
